Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-POL fully delivered: 12-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review landed in political.md (192 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; two medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-6 social_contract_theory→political_legitimacy defensible-MED question-vs-answer dialectical-ordering; N-5 political_philosophy granularity-mismatch-MED top-level-discipline-label-as-prereq) get fortified at the closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0114 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-POL landed a 12-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind + S-0111 logic + S-0112 language + S-0113 science precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/political.md (192 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 11 sound (91.7%), 1 defensible-medium (E-6 social_contract_theory→political_legitimacy — NEW question-vs-answer dialectical-ordering reversal shape: SEP-canonical "Political Legitimacy" entry runs the question-then-answers structure with social-contract as one major answer-family among consent / fair-play / democratic / instrumental, so the canonical pedagogical ordering is political_legitimacy → social_contract_theory; the seed's reverse direction teaches the answer-family as a self-contained body of philosophical machinery first, then applies it to the legitimacy question second — internally coherent on the migration's parallel-paths structure E-2 political_authority→political_legitimacy + E-6 social_contract_theory→political_legitimacy but inverts the SEP-canonical question-then-answers structure; distinct in shape from prior reversal patterns — position-vs-criterion S-0108, argument-vs-position S-0110, developmental-arc S-0112 / S-0113, tools-vs-position S-0112, multi-prereq overdetermined S-0111). Node-verdict tally: 7 sound, 1 granularity-mismatch-medium (N-5 political_philosophy — TOP-LEVEL DISCIPLINE LABEL: the per-node prompt template's literal granularity criterion fires explicitly because Political Philosophy is one of the example discipline-names named in the prompt; THIRD TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern in the routine block after S-0112 philosophy_of_language E-6 implicit and S-0113 N-5 philosophy_of_science explicit; structurally distinct from the SUB-discipline-label-with-content pattern flagged at S-0105 N-8 / S-0108 N-4 / S-0108 N-9 / S-0109 N-4 / S-0109 N-6). Substantive defects: 2 of 20 sampled elements (10%) — between S-0113 science 10.5% and S-0110 mind 10.8%; below S-0109 metaphysics 14.3%, S-0108 ethics 16.7%, S-0112 language 21%; above S-0111 logic 5% and S-0105 epistemology 5.4%; well below the cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104). The pattern fits the structural prediction that political philosophy is a position-family-rich subdomain (liberalism / libertarianism / communitarianism / republicanism / conservatism / socialism / multiculturalism) with both objective historical-conceptual sequencing (state → sovereignty; natural rights → human rights; social contract authors in chronological order) AND substantive philosophical contestation (position-vs-position direction questions; dialectical-ordering questions about question-vs-answer relations) — moderate-band defect rate predicted, observed. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was below the trigger — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-6) was 1/6 = 16.7%; standard 35% density held. ONE defensible verdict (E-6) is a NEW shape: question-vs-answer dialectical-ordering, where the seed teaches a major answer-family (the social-contract tradition as a self-contained body of philosophical machinery) before the question it answers (legitimacy as the normative property of authority) — distinct in kind from prior dialectical-ordering reversal patterns including S-0105's frameworks-vs-motivations defensibles, S-0108's position-vs-criterion reversal, S-0110's argument-vs-position reversal, S-0112's tools-vs-position reversal, S-0112 / S-0113's developmental-arc reversal, and S-0111's multi-prereq overdetermined defensible. The granularity-mismatch flag at N-5 is the THIRD TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern in the routine block (after philosophy_of_language at S-0112 implicit only and philosophy_of_science at S-0113 explicit), now spanning three subdomains; political_philosophy is literally one of the example discipline-names named in the per-node prompt template's flag criterion. Three sound-medium verdicts recorded for closeout aggregate-scan: E-10 state_political→sovereignty (from-familiar-to-conceptual ordering supportable; SEP's stand-alone abstract treatment suggests abstract-to-applied may also be canonical); E-11 political_philosophy→social_contract_theory (discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine, parallel to S-0112 / S-0113 patterns); E-12 communitarianism→multiculturalism (multiculturalism has roots in both communitarian critique AND liberal pluralism; communitarianism is contributing-but-not-exclusive prereq, but the seed has both E-30 liberalism→multiculturalism and this E-12 communitarianism→multiculturalism so dual-prereq is illuminative-and-canonical). Two load-bearing aggregate observations surfaced for the closeout: (1) NEW question-vs-answer dialectical-ordering reversal shape at E-6 (closeout adjudicates whether to treat as a NEW gate-feasible audit-system-input class or as a sub-shape of the broader dialectical-ordering family); (2) TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern now in three subdomains (philosophy_of_language at S-0112 E-6, philosophy_of_science at S-0113 N-5 / E-2 / E-3, political_philosophy at S-0114 N-5 / E-11) — strengthens the existing pre-listed audit-system-input proposal #2 (`discipline_label_node_at_root` validator soft-warn) specifically with a top-level-vs-sub-level differentiation: the closeout may propose two distinct soft-warn shapes, one for top-level discipline labels (philosophy_of_X / political_philosophy) and one for sub-discipline labels with substantive content (modality / mereology / animal_ethics / moral_epistemology / bayesian_epistemology). No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals + S-0104's `cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary` candidate + S-0110's argument-vs-position directionality candidate were not extended at this routine layer. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 34 within-political edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; confirmed graph-wide again — ninth session in a row with this pattern, after AUDIT-CB / AUDIT-EPI / AUDIT-ETH / AUDIT-MET / AUDIT-MIN / AUDIT-LOG / AUDIT-LAN / AUDIT-SCI). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-6, N-5) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0113 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-POL criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-AES (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no other dependencies; aesthetics subdomain, 11 of 32 edges at 35% density). 2 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
